## Fixed

- **Browser-tab favicon is now visible in dark mode** (#12). The KasmVNC web UI
  shipped dark Kasm-logo favicons (`368_kasm_logo_only_*.png`) that disappeared
  against a dark browser tab (e.g. Chrome dark mode). The image now overwrites
  every favicon the web client references in `index.html` with the **Krusader
  icon** — light blue panes and a white cursor — so the tab icon stays clearly
  visible on both light and dark themes.

  The override happens at build time and tracks whatever filenames the KasmVNC
  base image references, so it keeps working across base-image updates. Thanks to
  **@omarahmed786** for the report.
